Personnel.name: Personnel
Personnel.description: Individuals involved in research administration: faculty, staff, students, postdocs, fellows, external collaborators, and sponsor-side contacts.

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Person ID, Employee ID, Researcher ID, Faculty ID, User ID

columns.name: Honorific
columns.description: Dr., Prof., etc.

columns.name: First_Name
columns.description: First name

columns.name: Middle_Name
columns.description: Middle name or initial

columns.name: Last_Name
columns.description: Last name

columns.name: Suffix
columns.description: Name suffix (Jr., III, etc.)

columns.name: Primary_Email
columns.description: Unique when not null

columns.name: ORCID
columns.description: Format 0000-0000-0000-0000; unique when not null

columns.name: Home_Organization_ID
columns.description: The Organization the person primarily affiliates with
columns.synonyms: Department, Home Department, Affiliation, Home Org

columns.name: Home_Organization_Identifier
columns.description: The identifier this person carries at their Home_Organization (Banner ID, NetID, EmpID, NSF PO ID, etc.). Unique within Home_Organization_ID when not null. Primary deduplication key.
columns.synonyms: Banner ID, NetID, EmpID, PeopleSoft ID, Internal ID

columns.name: Person_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Faculty / Staff / Student / Postdoc / Resident / Fellow / External

PersonnelCredential.name: PersonnelCredential
PersonnelCredential.description: A person-level credential or identifier the institution needs to hold itself. Two scope rules: sponsor-system identifiers (eRA Commons, NSF FastLane) always in scope; HR-domain credentials in scope only for non-employee Personnel where HRIS does not apply.

columns.name: PersonnelCredential_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: The Personnel this credential belongs to

columns.name: Credential_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Citizenship / Visa_Status / Permanent_Resident_Status / eRA_Commons_ID / NSF_FastLane_ID / Sponsor_Login_ID / CITI_Training / IRB_Training / IACUC_Training / Biosafety_Training / Export_Control_Training / Security_Clearance / Background_Check / Other

columns.name: Credential_Value
columns.description: The credential's value (ISO 3166 country code, eRA Commons username, clearance level, etc.)

columns.name: Issuing_Authority_Organization_ID
columns.description: The issuing or attesting authority

columns.name: Issued_Date
columns.description: When the credential was issued by the authority

columns.name: Expiration_Date
columns.description: Null when the credential does not expire

columns.name: Verification_Date
columns.description: When the institution last verified this credential

columns.name: Credential_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Active / Expired / Revoked / Pending_Verification

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free-text notes about this credential

Organization.name: Organization
Organization.description: Institutional entities that participate in research funding flows: sponsors, academic units, subrecipients, vendors, committees.

columns.name: Organization_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Org ID, Entity ID, Institution ID

columns.name: Organization_Name
columns.description: Full name of the organization
columns.synonyms: Org Name, Entity Name, Institution Name

columns.name: Organization_Type
columns.description: Structural classification. Functional roles (sponsor, subrecipient, vendor, committee) are recorded as OrganizationCapability rows.

columns.name: Parent_Organization_ID
columns.description: Self-referencing

columns.name: Sponsor_Type
columns.description: Constrained when present: Federal / State / Local / Foundation / Industry / Higher_Ed_PassThrough / Foreign / Tribal / Internal. Required when the Organization has an OrganizationCapability row with Capability = 'Sponsor'
columns.synonyms: Funder Type, Funding Source Type, Sponsor Category

OrganizationCapability.name: OrganizationCapability
OrganizationCapability.description: The functional roles an Organization plays. An Organization may carry multiple capabilities (NIH is both a Sponsor and, in some contexts, a Committee). The capability set is what cross-table constraints check.

columns.name: OrganizationCapability_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Organization_ID
columns.description: The Organization this capability belongs to

columns.name: Capability_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'OrganizationCapability'. Recommended values: Sponsor / Prime_Sponsor / Subrecipient / Vendor / Committee / Program_Office / Pass_Through_Entity

columns.name: Capability_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Active / Suspended / Terminated / Probationary. Distinguishes a capability that is currently in good standing from one that has been suspended (e.g., a subrecipient suspended for risk reasons) or terminated. Distinct from Is_Active row-level soft delete

columns.name: Risk_Level
columns.description: Standing risk of this Organization in this capacity (subrecipient general risk profile, vendor performance risk, sponsor payment risk).

columns.name: Effective_Start_Date
columns.description: When the organization began playing this role (used for historical orgs no longer active in this capability)

columns.name: Effective_End_Date
columns.description: When the organization stopped playing this role

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free-text notes about this capability

OrganizationIdentifier.name: OrganizationIdentifier
OrganizationIdentifier.description: External identifiers an Organization carries: UEI, EIN, DUNS, CAGE, IPF, IPEDS_ID, sponsor-issued codes. Parallels PersonnelCredential for people.

columns.name: OrganizationIdentifier_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Organization_ID
columns.description: The Organization this identifier belongs to

columns.name: Identifier_Type
columns.description: Constrained: UEI / EIN / DUNS / CAGE / IPF / IPEDS / Sponsor_Code / Other

columns.name: Identifier_Value
columns.description: The actual identifier value

columns.name: Issuing_Authority_Organization_ID
columns.description: The agency that issued or maintains this identifier (SAM.gov, IRS, NIH, NCES, etc.)

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free-text notes about this identifier

ContactDetails.name: ContactDetails
ContactDetails.description: Email, phone, fax, mobile, and address records. Each record attaches to exactly one of a Personnel or an Organization.

columns.name: ContactDetails_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Personnel_ID or Organization_ID is non-null

columns.name: Organization_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Personnel_ID or Organization_ID is non-null

columns.name: Contact_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'ContactType'. Recommended values: Email / Phone / Mobile / Fax / Mailing_Address

columns.name: Contact_Value
columns.description: The actual email/phone/address text

columns.name: Is_Primary
columns.description: At most one primary per (referenced entity, Contact_Type)

OrganizationRole.name: OrganizationRole
OrganizationRole.description: A person's role at an Organization. Generalizes the committee-member and external-party contact patterns. Distinct from AwardRole (institutional staff on an Award) and ProtocolRole (personnel on a compliance protocol).

columns.name: OrganizationRole_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person holding the role

columns.name: Organization_ID
columns.description: The Organization the person holds a role at

columns.name: Role_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'OrganizationRole'. Recommended values include committee roles (Chair/Vice_Chair/Member/Ex_Officio/Alternate) and external-party-contact roles (Program_Officer/Grants_Management_Specialist/Contract_Officer/Scientific_Review_Officer/Authorized_Official/Signing_Official/Technical_Contact/Financial_Contact/Compliance_Contact/Subrecipient_PI_Contact/Subrecipient_Project_Lead)

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Scoping when the role applies to a specific Award

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Scoping when the role applies to a specific Subaward

columns.name: RFA_ID
columns.description: Scoping when the role applies to a specific funding opportunity

columns.name: Start_Date
columns.description: When the person assumed the role

columns.name: End_Date
columns.description: When the person left the role; null while current

RFA.name: RFA
RFA.description: A funding opportunity announcement (program announcement, solicitation, BAA, RFP).

columns.name: RFA_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Opportunity ID, Solicitation ID, BAA ID, FOA ID

columns.name: RFA_Number
columns.description: Sponsor-issued opportunity number
columns.synonyms: Opportunity Number, FOA Number, Program Announcement Number, Solicitation Number

columns.name: RFA_Title
columns.description: Title of the funding opportunity

columns.name: Sponsor_Organization_ID
columns.description: Referenced Organization has an OrganizationCapability with Capability = 'Sponsor'

columns.name: Mechanism_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'FundingMechanism'

columns.name: Funding_Mechanism_Description
columns.description: Free-text description for mechanisms not in the canonical taxonomy

columns.name: Assistance_Listing_Number
columns.description: Federal program identifier (formerly CFDA)

columns.name: Announcement_Date
columns.description: When the opportunity was announced

columns.name: LOI_Deadline
columns.description: Letter-of-intent deadline, when required

columns.name: Pre_Proposal_Deadline
columns.description: Pre-proposal deadline, when required

columns.name: Submission_Deadline
columns.description: Full proposal submission deadline

columns.name: Funding_Floor_Amount
columns.description: Minimum award amount stated in the opportunity

columns.name: Funding_Ceiling_Amount
columns.description: Maximum award amount stated in the opportunity

columns.name: Expected_Award_Count
columns.description: Number of awards the sponsor expects to make

columns.name: Maximum_Duration_Months
columns.description: Maximum project period allowed, in months

columns.name: RFA_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Submission_Portal_URL
columns.description: URL of the sponsor submission portal for this opportunity

RFARequirement.name: RFARequirement
RFARequirement.description: A specific requirement extracted from an RFA. Acts as a template; per-proposal completion is tracked via an Action.

columns.name: RFARequirement_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: RFA_ID
columns.description: The RFA this requirement belongs to

columns.name: Requirement_Code
columns.description: Unique within an RFA

columns.name: Requirement_Text
columns.description: The requirement as stated in the opportunity

columns.name: Requirement_Category
columns.description: Constrained: Eligibility / Budget / Format / Compliance / Reporting / Personnel / Document / Review_Criterion / Submission / Deadline / Special_Condition / PAPPG_Deviation / Other

columns.name: Page_Reference
columns.description: Where in the RFA the requirement appears

columns.name: Format_Specification
columns.description: Formatting rules (page limits, font, margins, file format)

columns.name: Structured_Rule_Type
columns.description: For machine-checkable rules

columns.name: Structured_Rule_Value
columns.description: Rule expression in the Type's format

Proposal.name: Proposal
Proposal.description: A formal request for funding submitted to a sponsor.

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Application ID, Submission ID, Pre-Award ID

columns.name: Proposal_Number
columns.description: Unique within the institution
columns.synonyms: Internal Proposal Number, Application Number, Pre-Award Number

columns.name: Proposal_Title
columns.description: Title of the proposed work

columns.name: RFA_ID
columns.description: Not all proposals respond to a formal RFA

columns.name: Sponsor_Organization_ID
columns.description: The funder

columns.name: Submitting_Organization_ID
columns.description: The unit preparing the proposal
columns.synonyms: Submitting Unit, Submitting Department, Originating Unit

columns.name: Administering_Organization_ID
columns.description: The unit managing finances

columns.name: Previous_Proposal_ID
columns.description: Lineage for resubmissions, renewals, continuations

columns.name: Originating_Proposal_ID
columns.description: Root of this Proposal's Previous_Proposal_ID chain. Null when this Proposal is itself the root. Auto-updates if Previous_Proposal_ID is corrected.

columns.name: Group_ID
columns.description: User-maintained grouping label that ties related Proposals together under one longitudinal scientific or scholarly identity. Independent of the lineage chain.
columns.synonyms: Project Group, Research Line, Program Label

columns.name: Submission_Version
columns.description: Default 1

columns.name: Proposed_Start_Date
columns.description: Proposed project period start

columns.name: Proposed_End_Date
columns.description: Proposed project period end

columns.name: Total_Proposed_Direct
columns.description: Total proposed direct costs across all periods

columns.name: Total_Proposed_Indirect
columns.description: Total proposed indirect (F&A) costs across all periods

columns.name: Total_Proposed_Budget
columns.description: Total proposed costs (direct + indirect) across all periods
columns.synonyms: Total Costs, TC Total, Total Budget

columns.name: Submission_Deadline
columns.description: The sponsor deadline this proposal targets

columns.name: Submission_Date
columns.description: When the proposal was actually submitted

columns.name: Internal_Approval_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Decision_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Decision_Date
columns.description: When the sponsor decision was received

columns.name: Risk_Level
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Proposal_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'ProposalType'. Recommended values: New / Resubmission / Renewal / Continuation / Revision / Task_Order

columns.name: Mechanism_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'FundingMechanism'
columns.synonyms: Funding Mechanism, Activity Code, Award Type

ProposalApproval.name: ProposalApproval
ProposalApproval.description: A step in the institutional approval chain for a Proposal. Most universities require sign-off from PI, department chair, dean, and OSP before a Proposal can be submitted.

columns.name: ProposalApproval_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: The Proposal being routed for approval

columns.name: Approval_Step_Order
columns.description: Sequence within the routing chain (1 = first signature)

columns.name: Approval_Role
columns.description: Constrained: PI / Co_Investigator / Department_Chair / College_Dean / Center_Director / OSP_Pre_Award / Compliance_Office / VPR / Other. The institutional role that performs this step

columns.name: Approver_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The specific person who performs (or is expected to perform) this step

columns.name: Approval_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Pending / Approved / Rejected / Bypassed / Returned_for_Revision

columns.name: Action_Date
columns.description: Required when Approval_Status is not Pending

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free-text notes recorded at this approval step

PreAwardAuthorization.name: PreAwardAuthorization
PreAwardAuthorization.description: An institutional pre-award authorization to spend at-risk on a Proposal that has been favorably reviewed but not yet officially awarded.

columns.name: PreAwardAuthorization_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: The Proposal the at-risk authorization is for

columns.name: Maximum_Amount
columns.description: The institution-approved at-risk spending ceiling

columns.name: Authorization_Date
columns.description: When the at-risk spending was authorized

columns.name: Effective_Start_Date
columns.description: Start of the authorized at-risk spending window

columns.name: Effective_End_Date
columns.description: End of the authorized at-risk spending window

columns.name: Authorizing_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The institutional officer who authorized the at-risk spending

columns.name: Authorization_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Pending / Approved / Revoked / Converted_To_Award / Expired_Unused

columns.name: Converted_To_Award_ID
columns.description: Required when Authorization_Status = 'Converted_To_Award'; otherwise null. Populated once the Proposal becomes an Award and the pre-award authorization is folded into the executed funding

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free-text notes about the authorization

Award.name: Award
Award.description: A funded grant, contract, or cooperative agreement. The central post-award entity. Award represents inbound funding; Subaward represents the outbound symmetric case.

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Grant ID, Funded Project ID, Post-Award ID

columns.name: Award_Number
columns.description: Sponsor-issued award number. Unique within the institution
columns.synonyms: Sponsor Award Number, NoA Number, Grant Number, Funded Number

columns.name: Internal_Award_Number
columns.description: Institution's own internal award/project identifier (PeopleSoft project string, internal grant number, etc.)
columns.synonyms: Project String, PeopleSoft Project, Internal Grant Number, Internal Project

columns.name: Award_Title
columns.description: Title of the funded work
columns.synonyms: Grant Title, Project Title, Funded Title

columns.name: Group_ID
columns.description: A grouping label that ties related Awards together under one longitudinal scientific or scholarly identity. Pre-filled at Award insert from originating Proposal's Group_ID. May be overridden afterward.
columns.synonyms: Project Group, Research Line, Program Label

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: Every Award originates from a Proposal

columns.name: Sponsor_Organization_ID
columns.description: Referenced Organization has Capability = 'Sponsor'

columns.name: Prime_Sponsor_Organization_ID
columns.description: Original funder for pass-through awards
columns.synonyms: Pass-Through Sponsor, Original Funder, Ultimate Funder, Prime

columns.name: Administering_Organization_ID
columns.description: Institutional unit managing finances
columns.synonyms: Admin Unit, OSP, Sponsored Programs Office

columns.name: Parent_Award_ID
columns.description: Self-referencing. Incremental segments or supplements under the same prime. Distinct from Previous_Award_ID.

columns.name: Previous_Award_ID
columns.description: Self-referencing. Competing renewal lineage: when a new award supersedes an earlier one through competing renewal.

columns.name: Originating_Award_ID
columns.description: Root of this Award's Previous_Award_ID chain. Null when this Award is itself the root. Auto-updates if Previous_Award_ID is corrected.

columns.name: RFA_ID
columns.description: The funding opportunity the Award originated from, when known

columns.name: FAIN
columns.description: Federal Award Identification Number
columns.synonyms: Federal Award ID, Federal Identifier, USA Spending ID

columns.name: Assistance_Listing_Number
columns.description: Federal program identifier (formerly CFDA)

columns.name: Mechanism_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'FundingMechanism' (R01, R21, P01, T32, Cooperative_Agreement, Contract_BAA, etc.)
columns.synonyms: Funding Mechanism, Activity Code, Award Type

columns.name: Funding_Mechanism_Description
columns.description: Free-text description for mechanisms not in the canonical taxonomy

columns.name: Original_Start_Date
columns.description: Start of the originally authorized Period of Performance at award execution. Frozen; not adjusted by Modifications.
columns.synonyms: Original POP Start, Award Start, Original PoP

columns.name: Original_End_Date
columns.description: End of the originally authorized Period of Performance at award execution. Frozen. To query the live end date after extensions, use Current_End_Date.
columns.synonyms: Original POP End, Original Award End

columns.name: Current_End_Date
columns.description: Current end after Modifications. Derived from Modifications.
columns.synonyms: POP End, Live End Date, Current Award End

columns.name: Original_Total_Funded
columns.description: Funded amount at award execution. Frozen.
columns.synonyms: Original Award Amount, Original Funding, Initial Funded

columns.name: Current_Total_Funded
columns.description: Originally funded amount plus sum of approved funding-changing Modifications.
columns.synonyms: Current Award Amount, Live Funding, Cumulative Funded

columns.name: Current_PI_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The current PI when in single-PI mode; null when in Multi_PI mode or when no PI is active. Query-convenience denormalization parallel to Current_End_Date and Current_Total_Funded. AwardRole remains canonical for full team membership.

columns.name: Total_Anticipated_Funding
columns.description: Total funding anticipated across all periods if all increments are funded

columns.name: Award_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Risk_Level
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Is_Flow_Through
columns.description: True when money flows from a prime sponsor through the direct sponsor

columns.name: Subject_To_Federal_Funding
columns.description: Derivation rule and recomputation triggers documented in *Implementation guidance*

Modification.name: Modification
Modification.description: A change to an Award or Subaward after initial funding. XOR-attached to either Award or Subaward.

columns.name: Modification_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Modification_Number
columns.description: Unique within the parent agreement
columns.synonyms: Mod Number, Amendment Number, Change Order Number

columns.name: Effective_Date
columns.description: When the modification takes effect
columns.synonyms: Mod Effective Date, Change Effective Date

columns.name: Event_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'ModificationEventType'. Recommended values: Incremental_Funding / No_Cost_Extension / Budget_Revision / PI_Change / Scope_Change / Carryover / Rebudget / Sponsor_Transfer / Supplement / Cost_Transfer_Authorization
columns.synonyms: Modification Type, Amendment Type, Change Type

columns.name: Continuation_Type
columns.description: Constrained when present: Competing / Non_Competing / Supplement / Other

columns.name: Approval_Status
columns.description: Reversed = an approved Modification later withdrawn by sponsor or invalidated; excluded from derivations of Award.Current_End_Date and Award.Current_Total_Funded

columns.name: Requires_Prior_Approval
columns.description: Whether the change required sponsor prior approval

columns.name: Prior_Approval_Granted_Date
columns.description: Required when Requires_Prior_Approval is true and Approval_Status is Approved

columns.name: Funding_Change_Amount
columns.description: Positive for adds, negative for reductions. Required for funding-changing event types; null for non-financial event types

columns.name: New_End_Date
columns.description: The revised end date of the parent agreement after this Modification takes effect. Required when Event_Type resolves to an end-date-changing event (No_Cost_Extension, Supplement when it extends the period, Sponsor_Transfer, Continuation). Null otherwise. Used by the derived Award.Current_End_Date and Subaward.Current_End_Date rules

columns.name: Carryover_Amount
columns.description: Required when the Event_Type resolves to Carryover

columns.name: Carryforward_Amount
columns.description: Companion of Carryover depending on accounting policy

columns.name: Pre_Award_Costs_Amount
columns.description: At-risk spending captured at the modification level

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Free-text description of the change

Subaward.name: Subaward
Subaward.description: A subaward agreement between the institution and a subrecipient. Subaward exists at two scopes: planned (Proposal-stage) and executed (post-Prime-Award). Same row identity spans both via status change.

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Subcontract ID, Subagreement ID, Sub ID

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: The proposal that planned this subaward. Required when Subaward_Status = 'Proposed'. Persists after the transition to Pending/Active so the originating-proposal link is preserved across the subaward lifecycle

columns.name: Prime_Award_ID
columns.description: References Award (the parent inbound award). Required when Subaward_Status ≥ 'Pending' (i.e., the prime award has been received). Null while Subaward_Status = 'Proposed'

columns.name: Parent_Subaward_ID
columns.description: Self-referencing. For cascading or amended subawards under the same prime.

columns.name: Group_ID
columns.description: Pre-filled at Subaward insert from the Prime Award's Group_ID (or from the originating Proposal's Group_ID at the Proposed stage). Subaward renewal lineage flows through the Prime Award chain (Subaward.Prime_Award_ID -> Award.Previous_Award_ID + same Subrecipient_Organization_ID); no dedicated Previous_Subaward_ID column.

columns.name: Subrecipient_Organization_ID
columns.description: Referenced Organization has Capability = 'Subrecipient'

columns.name: Administering_Organization_ID
columns.description: Institutional unit responsible for monitoring this subaward

columns.name: Subaward_Number
columns.description: Unique within the institution
columns.synonyms: Subcontract Number, Sub Number, Subagreement Number

columns.name: Subaward_Title
columns.description: Title of the subrecipient scope of work

columns.name: Total_Subaward_Amount
columns.description: Current obligated amount (planned amount at Proposed stage)

columns.name: Total_Anticipated_Amount
columns.description: Total subaward amount anticipated if all increments are funded

columns.name: Original_Start_Date
columns.description: Original subaward period start, frozen at execution

columns.name: Original_End_Date
columns.description: Original subaward period end, frozen at execution

columns.name: Current_End_Date
columns.description: Current end after modifications
columns.synonyms: Sub POP End, Sub Live End

columns.name: Current_PI_Personnel_ID
columns.description: Current PI in single-PI mode; null in Multi_PI mode or community-partner case

columns.name: Risk_Level
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Subaward_Status
columns.description: Subaward_Status = 'Proposed' indicates pre-award planned subaward

columns.name: Monitoring_Frequency_Months
columns.description: How often subrecipient monitoring is performed
columns.synonyms: Sub Monitoring Cadence, Risk Review Interval

Negotiation.name: Negotiation
Negotiation.description: The contract or agreement bargaining lifecycle between the institution and a counterparty before final terms are accepted. Covers sponsor-on-Proposal (pre-NoA terms), sponsor-on-Award (mid-stream), and subrecipient-on-Subaward.

columns.name: Negotiation_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: At least one of Proposal_ID, Award_ID, or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: For modifications or terms being negotiated mid-award

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: For subaward terms being negotiated

columns.name: Counterparty_Organization_ID
columns.description: For sponsor-side negotiations: Capability = 'Sponsor' or 'Prime_Sponsor'. For subaward-side: Capability = 'Subrecipient'.

columns.name: Institutional_Lead_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The institution's lead negotiator

columns.name: Counterparty_Contact_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The counterparty's lead negotiator

columns.name: Negotiation_Start_Date
columns.description: When negotiation began

columns.name: Negotiation_End_Date
columns.description: Required when Negotiation_Status is Resolved or Abandoned

columns.name: Negotiation_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Outcome_Description
columns.description: Free-text summary of the negotiation outcome

Terms.name: Terms
Terms.description: The contractual terms and conditions of a funded agreement. One Terms row per parent agreement (Award or Subaward).

columns.name: Terms_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Payment_Method
columns.description: Constrained: Reimbursement / Advance / Cost_Reimbursement / Fixed_Price / Letter_of_Credit / Payment_Request

columns.name: Invoicing_Frequency
columns.description: Constrained: Monthly / Quarterly / Semi_Annual / Annual / Upon_Request / Milestone

columns.name: Invoice_Submission_Days
columns.description: Days after period close that invoices are due

columns.name: Reporting_Requirements
columns.description: Free-text summary of reporting obligations under the agreement

columns.name: Special_Conditions
columns.description: Free-text special award conditions

columns.name: Property_Requirements
columns.description: Equipment, property, and inventions provisions

columns.name: Publication_Requirements
columns.description: Pre-publication review windows, attribution

columns.name: Closeout_Requirements
columns.description: Final reports, equipment disposition, records retention

columns.name: Record_Retention_Years
columns.description: Required record retention period, in years

Report.name: Report
Report.description: A scheduled or ad hoc deliverable to the sponsor: progress report, RPPR, FFR, final report, invention statement, data-sharing plan update.

columns.name: Report_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Report_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Progress / RPPR / Financial / FFR_SF425 / Final_Progress / Final_Financial / Invention_Statement / Data_Sharing / Equipment_Inventory / Audit_Response / Other

columns.name: Reporting_Period_Start_Date
columns.description: Start of the period the report covers

columns.name: Reporting_Period_End_Date
columns.description: End of the period the report covers

columns.name: Due_Date
columns.description: When the report is due to the sponsor

columns.name: Submitted_Date
columns.description: Required when Report_Status ≥ 'Submitted'

columns.name: Submitted_By_Personnel_ID
columns.description: Required when Report_Status ≥ 'Submitted'

columns.name: Sponsor_Confirmation_Number
columns.description: Sponsor-issued upon receipt

columns.name: Report_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Pending / Drafted / Submitted / Accepted / Returned_for_Revision / Late / Waived

columns.name: Acceptance_Date
columns.description: Required when Report_Status = 'Accepted'

columns.name: Linked_Document_ID
columns.description: The report file itself

Closeout.name: Closeout
Closeout.description: The closeout workflow object for an Award or Subaward. Coordinates several subworkflows (final report, final invoice, equipment disposition, IP closeout, COI closeout, records retention).

columns.name: Closeout_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: One Closeout row per parent agreement

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Closeout_Initiated_Date
columns.description: When closeout was initiated

columns.name: Final_Report_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Not_Required / Pending / Submitted / Accepted

columns.name: Final_Invoice_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Not_Required / Pending / Submitted / Paid

columns.name: Equipment_Disposition_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Not_Applicable / In_Progress / Complete

columns.name: IP_Closeout_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Not_Applicable / In_Progress / Complete

columns.name: COI_Closeout_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Not_Applicable / In_Progress / Complete

columns.name: Records_Retention_Start_Date
columns.description: Typically the date the final FFR is accepted

columns.name: Records_Retention_End_Date
columns.description: Computed from Records_Retention_Start_Date and Terms.Record_Retention_Years

columns.name: Final_Closeout_Date
columns.description: Required when Closeout_Status = 'Complete'

columns.name: Closeout_Status
columns.description: Constrained: In_Progress / Pending_Sponsor_Final_Audit / Complete / Reopened

SubmissionProfile.name: SubmissionProfile
SubmissionProfile.description: Configuration of an institution's connection to a sponsor's electronic submission system.

columns.name: SubmissionProfile_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Organization_ID
columns.description: The sponsor

columns.name: Submission_System
columns.description: Constrained: grants_gov / research_gov / era_commons / nspires / manual / other

columns.name: Environment
columns.description: Constrained: training / production

columns.name: Credential_Reference_Path
columns.description: External secret-store path; credentials are NOT stored in the schema

SubmissionPackage.name: SubmissionPackage
SubmissionPackage.description: An immutable snapshot of the documents and metadata assembled for submission.

columns.name: SubmissionPackage_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: The Proposal this package was assembled for

columns.name: Package_Version
columns.description: Default 1; increments per snapshot

columns.name: Package_Hash
columns.description: SHA-256 of the assembled package

columns.name: Assembled_Date
columns.description: When the package was assembled

columns.name: Package_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

SubmissionAttempt.name: SubmissionAttempt
SubmissionAttempt.description: One outbound transmission of a SubmissionPackage to an external sponsor system.

columns.name: SubmissionAttempt_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: SubmissionPackage_ID
columns.description: The package this attempt transmitted

columns.name: SubmissionProfile_ID
columns.description: The submission profile (system + credentials context) used

columns.name: Submission_System
columns.description: Denormalized from the profile at attempt creation for historical accuracy

columns.name: Environment
columns.description: Same; constrained to: training / production

columns.name: Attempt_Number
columns.description: Unique within (SubmissionPackage, SubmissionProfile)

columns.name: Submitted_Timestamp
columns.description: When the attempt was transmitted

columns.name: Attempt_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Sponsor_Confirmation_Number
columns.description: Sponsor-issued upon acceptance

AwardRole.name: AwardRole
AwardRole.description: A person's role on an Award (or Subaward), with effort allocation, date range, and credit attribution. Limited to award-side staffing roles.

columns.name: AwardRole_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Project Role ID, Investigator Assignment, Personnel Assignment

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person holding the role

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Role_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'AwardRole'. Recommended values: PI / Co_PI / Co_I / Multi_PI / Coordinator / Key_Personnel / Cohort_Participant / Coach / Mentor / Trainee
columns.synonyms: Role, Position, Investigator Role, Personnel Role

columns.name: Coach_Personnel_ID
columns.description: For cohort participation

columns.name: FTE_Percent
columns.description: Committed effort percentage (0.00-100.00). Authoritative 'what was promised' figure. Institutions typically arrange a person's concurrent FTE commitments not to exceed 100%, but this is a data invariant; spec does not enforce a per-person sum.
columns.synonyms: Effort Percentage, Committed Effort, Time Allocation

columns.name: Credit_Percent
columns.description: Investigator credit allocation. Institutions typically arrange Credit_Percent to sum to 100 across active credit-bearing roles on the parent agreement, but spec does not enforce a sum-to-100 constraint.
columns.synonyms: Credit Allocation, Investigator Credit, Research Credit

columns.name: Credit_Unit_Organization_ID
columns.description: Unit receiving the credit

columns.name: Is_Key_Personnel
columns.description: Whether the person is designated key/senior personnel

columns.name: Is_Contact_PI
columns.description: Identifies the NIH MPI Contact PI on a multi-PI Award. At most one active Multi_PI row per parent agreement has Is_Contact_PI = true.
columns.synonyms: Contact PI, Lead Multi-PI, MPI Lead, NIH Contact PI

columns.name: Start_Date
columns.description: When the person assumed the role

columns.name: End_Date
columns.description: When the person left the role; null while current

Effort.name: Effort
Effort.description: Per-stage effort detail for an AwardRole. The Lifecycle_Stage column distinguishes proposed, approved, charged, and certified effort numbers.

columns.name: Effort_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: AwardRole_ID
columns.description: References AwardRole (the assignment)

columns.name: Lifecycle_Stage
columns.description: Constrained: Proposed / Approved / Charged / Certified

columns.name: Parent_Effort_ID
columns.description: Chain pointer. Later-stage rows point at nearest existing earlier-stage row. Same-stage recertification (Certified -> Certified) also chains via this column.

columns.name: Period_Start_Date
columns.description: Start of the effort reporting period

columns.name: Period_End_Date
columns.description: End of the effort reporting period

columns.name: Effort_Percent
columns.description: Authoritative for this Lifecycle_Stage
columns.synonyms: Time Spent, Period Effort, Charged Effort

columns.name: Person_Months
columns.description: Months-per-year denominator: 12 for Calendar, 9 for Academic, 3 for Summer

columns.name: Calendar_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Calendar / Academic / Summer
columns.synonyms: Effort Calendar, Appointment Type, Calendar Basis

columns.name: Charged_Amount
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Charged'

columns.name: Over_Cap_Amount
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Charged' (zero when not over cap)
columns.synonyms: Over-Cap Salary, NIH Cap Excess, Salary Cap Excess

columns.name: Certification_Method
columns.description: Constrained when present: PAR / Activity_Report / Timesheet / Other. Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Certified'

columns.name: Certifier_Personnel_ID
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Certified'
columns.synonyms: Effort Certifier, Approving Authority, PAR Certifier

columns.name: Certification_Date
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Certified'

columns.name: Certification_Statement_Text
columns.description: The legal attestation text the certifier accepted. Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Certified'. Recorded verbatim because the legal force of effort certification depends on what the certifier saw and accepted

columns.name: Certification_Signature_Reference
columns.description: Reference to a stored signature artifact (signed PDF, e-signature service record, IDP claim)

Budget.name: Budget
Budget.description: Detailed line items for a budget at a specific lifecycle stage. Each Budget row carries Proposal_ID at every stage (stable chain identity) and post-award Award_ID or Subaward_ID at Approved and later stages.

columns.name: Budget_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Budget Line, Cost Element, Budget Item

columns.name: Lifecycle_Stage
columns.description: Constrained: Proposed / Approved / Current / Actual

columns.name: Budget_Mode
columns.description: Constrained: Itemized / Modular

columns.name: Parent_Budget_ID
columns.description: Later-stage rows point back to earlier-stage rows (revisions chain)

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: Originating Proposal; stable across all Lifecycle_Stages. The Parent_Budget_ID chain spans Proposed -> Approved -> Current -> Actual without changing anchor.

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: The Award this budget belongs to at post-award stages. Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null when Lifecycle_Stage ≥ Approved; both null at Proposed.

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: The Subaward this budget belongs to at post-award stages. Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null when Lifecycle_Stage ≥ Approved; both null at Proposed.

columns.name: Period_Start_Date
columns.description: Start of the budget period this row covers
columns.synonyms: Budget Period Start, Year Start, Budget Year Begin

columns.name: Period_End_Date
columns.description: End of the budget period this row covers
columns.synonyms: Budget Period End, Year End, Budget Year Close

columns.name: Version_Number
columns.description: Default 1

columns.name: Module_Count
columns.description: Required when Budget_Mode = 'Modular'

columns.name: Module_Size_Amount
columns.description: Required when Budget_Mode = 'Modular' (typically $25,000 for NIH modular)

columns.name: Budget_Category_ID
columns.description: Required when Budget_Mode = 'Itemized'; one Budget row per line item

columns.name: Amount
columns.description: The line-item amount
columns.synonyms: Line Amount, Category Amount, Line Item Cost

columns.name: IndirectRate_ID
columns.description: The F&A (indirect-cost) rate that applies to this Budget period. Set at the Budget granularity because multi-year Awards may use different rates per period. Null when no F&A rate applies.
columns.synonyms: F&A Rate, Indirect Rate, Overhead Rate, IDC Rate

Fund.name: Fund
Fund.description: Fund codes from the institutional accounting system.

columns.name: Fund_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Fund_Code
columns.description: Unique within the institution
columns.synonyms: Fund Number, Fund String, Fund ID Code

columns.name: Fund_Name
columns.description: Human-readable name of the fund

columns.name: Organization_ID
columns.description: Owning unit

columns.name: Fund_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'FundType'. Recommended values: Restricted / Unrestricted / Endowment / Sponsored_Program

Account.name: Account
Account.description: Chart-of-accounts entry for general ledger coding.

columns.name: Account_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Account_Code
columns.description: Unique within the institution
columns.synonyms: Account Number, GL Code, Object Code, Account String

columns.name: Account_Name
columns.description: Human-readable name of the account

columns.name: Parent_Account_Code
columns.description: Self-referencing

columns.name: Account_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Asset / Liability / Equity / Revenue / Expense
columns.synonyms: GL Type, GAAP Type, Account Classification

FinanceCode.name: FinanceCode
FinanceCode.description: The institutional accounting string that connects an Award to fund and account codes.

columns.name: FinanceCode_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: The Award this finance code string is provisioned for

columns.name: Fund_ID
columns.description: The Fund segment of the code string

columns.name: Account_ID
columns.description: The Account segment of the code string

columns.name: Purpose_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'FinanceCodePurpose'. Recommended values: Direct_Costs / Cost_Share / Indirect_Costs / Subcontract
columns.synonyms: Purpose Code, Cost Purpose, Account Purpose

columns.name: Finance_Code_String
columns.description: The full FOAP (or equivalent) string
columns.synonyms: FOAP, FOAPAL, Chart String, Banner String, PeopleSoft String, GL String

Transaction.name: Transaction
Transaction.description: An individual financial entry charged to an Award or Subaward.

columns.name: Transaction_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Charge ID, Posting ID, Journal ID, JV ID

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Budget_ID
columns.description: The budget period the transaction lands in

columns.name: Fund_ID
columns.description: The Fund the transaction posted against

columns.name: Account_ID
columns.description: The Account the transaction posted against

columns.name: FinanceCode_ID
columns.description: The full finance code string the transaction posted against

columns.name: CostShare_ID
columns.description: Required when Transaction_Type resolves to Cost_Share. Identifies which cost-share commitment this transaction satisfies. Null for all other Transaction_Type values

columns.name: Transaction_Date
columns.description: When the transaction posted

columns.name: Transaction_Amount
columns.description: Sign convention: positive for charges/encumbrances, negative for reversals/transfers-out

columns.name: Transaction_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'TransactionType'. Recommended values: Expense / Revenue / Encumbrance / Transfer / Adjustment / Reversal / Cost_Share / Project_Income / Cost_Transfer_In / Cost_Transfer_Out
columns.synonyms: Charge Type, Entry Type, Posting Type

columns.name: Income_Treatment
columns.description: Constrained when present: Offset / Additive. Required when Transaction_Type resolves to project income

columns.name: Activity_Description
columns.description: Free-text description of the charge or entry

RateAgreement.name: RateAgreement
RateAgreement.description: The negotiated F&A (indirect cost) rate agreement (NICRA) between an institution and its cognizant federal agency.

columns.name: RateAgreement_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Institution_Organization_ID
columns.description: The institution the agreement covers

columns.name: Cognizant_Agency_Organization_ID
columns.description: The federal agency that negotiated the agreement (typically DHHS or ONR). Capability = 'Sponsor'

columns.name: Agreement_Number
columns.description: The agreement reference number
columns.synonyms: NICRA Number, F&A Agreement Number, Indirect Cost Agreement Number

columns.name: Agreement_Date
columns.description: Date the agreement was executed

columns.name: Effective_Start_Date
columns.description: First date the agreement's rates apply

columns.name: Effective_End_Date
columns.description: Null for open-ended agreements

columns.name: Agreement_Status
columns.description: Constrained: Active / Expired / Superseded / Provisional

IndirectRate.name: IndirectRate
IndirectRate.description: A single negotiated rate within a RateAgreement (on-campus, off-campus, MTDC, etc.).

columns.name: IndirectRate_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: RateAgreement_ID
columns.description: References RateAgreement (the parent agreement)

columns.name: Rate_Type
columns.description: Constrained: On_Campus / Off_Campus / MTDC / TDC / Clinical_Trial / Fringe_Benefits / Facilities / Administrative
columns.synonyms: F&A Rate Type, Indirect Cost Type, Overhead Type

columns.name: Base_Type
columns.description: Constrained: MTDC / TDC / Salaries_and_Wages / Direct_Salaries

columns.name: Rate_Percent
columns.description: The indirect (F&A) rate, as a percentage
columns.synonyms: F&A Rate, Indirect Rate, Overhead Rate, IDC Rate

columns.name: Effective_Start_Date
columns.description: When this rate becomes effective (may be a sub-period of the agreement)

columns.name: Effective_End_Date
columns.description: Null for open-ended current rates

Equipment.name: Equipment
Equipment.description: A sponsor-purchased or institution-acquired capital asset associated with an Award or Subaward.

columns.name: Equipment_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Asset_Tag
columns.description: Institution-issued asset tag. Unique within the institution
columns.synonyms: Asset Number, Inventory Tag, Property Tag

columns.name: Equipment_Name
columns.description: Name or short description of the asset

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Acquisition_Date
columns.description: When the asset was acquired

columns.name: Acquisition_Amount
columns.description: Acquisition cost of the asset

columns.name: Title_Vesting
columns.description: Constrained: Institution / Sponsor / Vendor / Shared / To_Be_Determined

columns.name: Location_Organization_ID
columns.description: Unit physically housing the equipment

columns.name: Custodian_Personnel_ID
columns.description: Responsible custodian

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Free-text description of the asset

columns.name: Equipment_Status
columns.description: Constrained: In_Use / In_Storage / Surplused / Transferred / Disposed / Lost

columns.name: Disposition_Date
columns.description: Required when Equipment_Status is Surplused, Transferred, Disposed, or Lost

Payment.name: Payment
Payment.description: Payment records covering scheduled, invoiced, received, and reconciled stages.

columns.name: Payment_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Lifecycle_Stage
columns.description: Constrained: Scheduled / Invoiced / Received / Reconciled

columns.name: Parent_Payment_ID
columns.description: Later-stage rows point at earlier-stage rows

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Budget_ID
columns.description: Optional period reference

columns.name: Scheduled_Date
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Scheduled'

columns.name: Scheduled_Amount
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Scheduled'

columns.name: Invoice_Number
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Invoiced' or later; unique within the parent agreement

columns.name: Submission_Date
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Invoiced'

columns.name: Actual_Date
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Received' or later

columns.name: Actual_Amount
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Received' or later

columns.name: Payment_Status
columns.description: Disposition; orthogonal to Lifecycle_Stage

CostShare.name: CostShare
CostShare.description: Cost-sharing commitments across the lifecycle. Carries Proposal_ID at every stage (stable chain identity) and post-award Award_ID or Subaward_ID at Committed and later stages.

columns.name: CostShare_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Lifecycle_Stage
columns.description: Constrained: Proposed / Committed / Met / Waived

columns.name: Parent_CostShare_ID
columns.description: Later-stage rows point back to earlier ones

columns.name: Proposal_ID
columns.description: Originating Proposal; stable across all Lifecycle_Stages

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: The Award this commitment belongs to at Committed and later stages. Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null when Lifecycle_Stage ≥ Committed; both null at Proposed.

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: The Subaward this commitment belongs to at Committed and later stages. Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null when Lifecycle_Stage ≥ Committed; both null at Proposed.

columns.name: Commitment_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'CostShareCommitmentType'. Recommended values: Cash / In_Kind / Third_Party / Waived_IDC / Effort_Only

columns.name: Amount_Committed
columns.description: Cost share amount committed

columns.name: Amount_Actual
columns.description: Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Met'

columns.name: Waiver_Reason
columns.description: Constrained: Effort_Not_Materialized / Sponsor_Approved_Removal / Sponsor_Removed_Requirement / Recategorized_To_Other_Funding / Other. Required when Lifecycle_Stage = 'Waived'; null otherwise. Distinguishes commitments waived because the work never happened vs commitments waived by sponsor or institutional decision

ComplianceRequirement.name: ComplianceRequirement
ComplianceRequirement.description: A regulatory approval required for research: IRB, IACUC, IBC, radiation safety, export control, etc. Standalone entity with its own lifecycle, independent of any particular Award. The Awards a requirement covers are recorded in ComplianceCoverage.

columns.name: ComplianceRequirement_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Protocol ID, Compliance ID, Requirement ID

columns.name: Parent_ComplianceRequirement_ID
columns.description: Self-referencing. A renewal or amendment references the predecessor; null for an initial requirement

columns.name: Requirement_Type
columns.description: Constrained: IRB / IACUC / IBC / COI / Radiation / Export_Control / Other. Determines which Reviewing Authority pattern applies (committee vs Empowered Official vs other)
columns.synonyms: Compliance Category, Regulatory Domain, Protocol Type

columns.name: Compliance_Number
columns.description: Authority-issued identifier (IRB protocol number, IACUC protocol number, etc.). Unique within (Issuing_Authority_Organization_ID, Requirement_Type) when not null.
columns.synonyms: Protocol Number, Approval Number, Registration Number, IRB Number, IACUC Number

columns.name: Issuing_Authority_Organization_ID
columns.description: The body that issues the Compliance_Number

columns.name: Reviewing_Authority_Organization_ID
columns.description: The body that reviews and approves this requirement. Required when Requirement_Type is IRB, IACUC, or IBC (these are board-reviewed by definition). Optional for Export_Control, Radiation, COI, or Other where a self-certification or no formal reviewing body applies. Referenced Organization carries an OrganizationCapability appropriate to the Requirement_Type (Committee for IRB/IACUC/IBC; Program_Office or similar for export control and radiation safety)
columns.synonyms: Reviewing Body, IRB Committee, IACUC Committee

columns.name: Review_Pathway_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'ComplianceReviewPathway'. Recommended values vary by Requirement_Type. For IRB: Exempt / Expedited / Full_Board / Not_Human_Subjects / Administrative. For Export Control: Fundamental_Research_Exclusion / Determination_Only / TCP_Required / License_Required.
columns.synonyms: Review Type, Review Category, IRB Pathway

columns.name: Submitted_Date
columns.description: When the protocol or requirement was submitted for review

columns.name: Approved_Date
columns.description: Required when Requirement_Status = 'Approved'

columns.name: Expiration_Date
columns.description: Null when the requirement is non-expiring (e.g., Export Control Fundamental_Research determination)

columns.name: Requirement_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Compliance_Classification_Level_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'ComplianceClassificationLevel'. Recommended values vary by Requirement_Type. For IRB (Common Rule): Minimal / More_Than_Minimal / High. For Export Control: Fundamental_Research / EAR_Controlled / ITAR_Controlled / OFAC_Restricted.

ComplianceCoverage.name: ComplianceCoverage
ComplianceCoverage.description: The M:N relationship between a ComplianceRequirement and the Awards (or Subawards) it covers.

columns.name: ComplianceCoverage_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: ComplianceRequirement_ID
columns.description: The compliance requirement providing coverage

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Exactly one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null

columns.name: Coverage_Start_Date
columns.description: When the protocol began covering this Award (or Subaward)

columns.name: Coverage_End_Date
columns.description: Null while still in effect

ProtocolRole.name: ProtocolRole
ProtocolRole.description: Personnel listed on a specific ComplianceRequirement (the PI on the protocol, IRB study staff, IACUC personnel, IBC investigators, TCP-cleared personnel). Parallels AwardRole and OrganizationRole.

columns.name: ProtocolRole_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: ComplianceRequirement_ID
columns.description: The protocol this roster entry belongs to

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person on the protocol roster

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Scopes this person's protocol responsibility to a specific Award when requirement covers multiple Awards. Null means responsibility spans every Award the requirement covers.

columns.name: Subaward_ID
columns.description: Same as Award_ID but for Subaward scoping. At most one of Award_ID or Subaward_ID is non-null.

columns.name: Role_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'ProtocolRole'. Recommended values: Primary_Investigator / Co_Investigator / Study_Coordinator / Research_Staff / Consenting_Personnel / Lab_Manager / Veterinary_Staff / Biosafety_Officer / Radiation_Worker / TCP_Cleared_Personnel / Other. Multi-PI protocols carry multiple Primary_Investigator rows.

columns.name: Training_Completion_Date
columns.description: Date required compliance training (CITI, etc.) was completed

columns.name: Start_Date
columns.description: When the person joined the protocol

columns.name: End_Date
columns.description: When the person left the protocol; null while current

ConflictOfInterest.name: ConflictOfInterest
ConflictOfInterest.description: Personal disclosures covering conflicts of interest and conflicts of commitment. Foreign-engagement disclosures and NSPM-33 reporting are out of scope; see Optional Extensions.

columns.name: ConflictOfInterest_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person making the disclosure

columns.name: Award_ID
columns.description: Required for project-specific disclosures; null for annual general disclosures

columns.name: Relationship_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'COIRelationshipType'. Recommended values: Financial / Consulting / Employment / Equity / Royalty / Board_Membership
columns.synonyms: COI Type, Conflict Type, Disclosure Category

columns.name: Entity_Name
columns.description: The entity the personnel has the relationship with, as free text. Required when Entity_Organization_ID is null; optional when an Organization FK is set (the Organization.Organization_Name is the canonical source)
columns.synonyms: External Entity, Conflicted Entity, Outside Org Name

columns.name: Entity_Organization_ID
columns.description: Set when the entity is tracked as an Organization in the model; null when it is an outside party not otherwise tracked

columns.name: OtherSupport_ID
columns.description: Set when this COI disclosure describes the same engagement also recorded as Other Support

columns.name: Financial_Interest_Amount
columns.description: Dollar value of the disclosed financial interest, when quantifiable

columns.name: Disclosure_Date
columns.description: When the disclosure was filed

columns.name: Disclosure_Period_Start_Date
columns.description: The period the disclosure covers (annual disclosures span the prior year)

columns.name: Disclosure_Period_End_Date
columns.description: End of the period the disclosure covers

columns.name: Review_Outcome
columns.description: Constrained: Under_Review / No_Conflict / Manageable_Conflict / Unmanageable_Conflict / Management_Plan_Required / Cleared

columns.name: Management_Plan_Description
columns.description: Required when Review_Outcome is Manageable_Conflict or Management_Plan_Required

OtherSupport.name: OtherSupport
OtherSupport.description: A Personnel record's external research support (current, pending, in-kind). The fact of outside support, person-anchored.

columns.name: OtherSupport_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Outside Support ID, Other Active Support ID

columns.name: Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person whose other support this is

columns.name: External_Sponsor_Name
columns.description: The funding source for the disclosed support, as free text. Required when External_Sponsor_Organization_ID is null; optional when an Organization FK is set (the Organization.Organization_Name is the canonical source)

columns.name: External_Sponsor_Organization_ID
columns.description: Set when the external sponsor is tracked as an Organization in the model

columns.name: External_Project_Title
columns.description: The title of the externally-funded project as known at the external sponsor

columns.name: Support_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Current / Pending / In_Kind
columns.synonyms: Other Support Category, Active vs Pending

columns.name: Annual_Effort_Months_Calendar
columns.description: Months per year of committed effort on calendar basis

columns.name: Total_Award_Amount
columns.description: The total funded amount of the disclosed support
columns.synonyms: External Award Amount, Outside Funding Total

columns.name: Effective_Start_Date
columns.description: When the external support began or is expected to begin

columns.name: Effective_End_Date
columns.description: Null when the support is open-ended

OtherSupportDisclosure.name: OtherSupportDisclosure
OtherSupportDisclosure.description: A single disclosure event of an OtherSupport row. The same outside appointment is typically disclosed many times across a researcher's career.

columns.name: OtherSupportDisclosure_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: OtherSupport_ID
columns.description: The OtherSupport item this disclosure event reported

columns.name: Disclosure_Date
columns.description: When this specific disclosure event occurred

columns.name: Disclosure_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Initial / Annual / JIT / Progress_Report / Research_Security_Reaffirmation / Other

columns.name: Triggering_Proposal_ID
columns.description: The proposal whose submission triggered this disclosure event (null when the disclosure is not proposal-triggered)

columns.name: Triggering_Award_ID
columns.description: The award whose reporting cycle triggered this disclosure event (null when the disclosure is not award-triggered)

columns.name: Disclosed_To_Sponsor_Organization_ID
columns.description: The sponsor that received this disclosure

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free-text notes about the disclosure event

AllowedValues.name: AllowedValues
AllowedValues.description: Institution-specific controlled vocabularies. The Value_Group column names a family.

columns.name: AllowedValue_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Value_Group
columns.description: The lookup family name. Canonical groups: ContactType, OrganizationCapability, AwardRole, OrganizationRole, ProtocolRole, FundType, TransactionType, ModificationEventType, ActionType, DocumentType, FinanceCodePurpose, COIRelationshipType, IndirectRateType, CostShareCommitmentType, RestrictionType, DeadlineType, ProposalType, FundingMechanism, ComplianceReviewPathway, ComplianceClassificationLevel

columns.name: Value_Code
columns.description: Unique within Value_Group. Stable code used in queries

columns.name: Value_Label
columns.description: Human-readable label

columns.name: Value_Description
columns.description: Longer description of what the value means at this institution

columns.name: Canonical_Value_Code
columns.description: The canonical code (across institutions) that this local code maps to. Null when the local code has no canonical equivalent.
columns.synonyms: Canonical Code, Cross-Institution Code, Standard Code

BudgetCategory.name: BudgetCategory
BudgetCategory.description: Standardized budget line item categories (SF-424 R&R standard).

columns.name: BudgetCategory_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Category_Code
columns.description: Unique. Examples: SR_PERSONNEL, OTH_PERSONNEL, EQUIPMENT, TRAVEL, PARTICIPANT_SUPPORT, OTHER_DIRECT
columns.synonyms: SF424 Category Code, NIH Category Code

columns.name: Category_Name
columns.description: Human-readable name of the budget category

columns.name: Category_Order
columns.description: Display order

columns.name: Is_Direct_Cost
columns.description: True for direct-cost categories; false for indirect-cost categories

columns.name: Document_ID
columns.description: PK
columns.synonyms: Attachment ID, File ID, Asset ID

columns.name: Related_Entity_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / ProposalApproval / PreAwardAuthorization / Personnel / PersonnelCredential / ComplianceRequirement / SubmissionPackage / Modification / Action / Restriction / Budget / Negotiation / Terms / Report / Closeout / Equipment

columns.name: Related_Entity_ID
columns.description: PK value in the table named by Related_Entity_Type

columns.name: Document_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'DocumentType'. Recommended values: NOA / Biosketch / DMP / Budget_Justification / Other_Support / Public_Access_Plan / LOI / Sponsor_Agreement / Subaward_Agreement / Modification_Notice / Approved_Items_Schedule / Closeout_Document / Compliance_Approval_Letter / Restriction_Authority_Document / Training_Certificate

columns.name: File_Name
columns.description: Original file name of the document

columns.name: File_Path
columns.description: Path or URI to the file in object storage / content management

columns.name: File_Hash
columns.description: SHA-256 of the file content

columns.name: File_Size_Bytes
columns.description: File size in bytes

columns.name: Version_Number
columns.description: Default 1

columns.name: Parent_Document_ID
columns.description: Self-referencing. When a new version of the same logical document is uploaded, the new row chains via this column to the predecessor. The latest version is the row at the end of the active chain.

columns.name: Uploaded_By_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person who uploaded the document

columns.name: Uploaded_Timestamp
columns.description: When the document was uploaded

Communication.name: Communication
Communication.description: Inbound or outbound correspondence between the institution and an external party.

columns.name: Communication_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Related_Entity_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / RFA / Modification / Negotiation / Terms / ComplianceRequirement / Personnel / Closeout / Report

columns.name: Related_Entity_ID
columns.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this communication attaches to

columns.name: Communication_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Email / Phone_Call / Meeting / Letter / Portal_Message / Other

columns.name: Direction
columns.description: Constrained: Inbound / Outbound

columns.name: Communication_Date
columns.description: The moment the communication occurred (or the email's sent-at timestamp)

columns.name: Subject
columns.description: The subject line for emails, the topic for meetings

columns.name: Body_Text
columns.description: Full text of the correspondence; null when body lives only in an attached Document

columns.name: Internal_Personnel_ID
columns.description: Institution-side participant

columns.name: External_Personnel_ID
columns.description: External participant when tracked in Personnel. Prefer this over External_Party_Name.

columns.name: External_Party_Name
columns.description: Free-text name when no Personnel record exists (one-off contacts, sponsor mailboxes)
columns.synonyms: External Name, Sponsor Mailbox, Counterparty Name

columns.name: External_Organization_ID
columns.description: The external party's organization

Restriction.name: Restriction
Restriction.description: Operational constraints attached to an entity (CUI, CMMC, export control, publication holds, foreign-personnel limits).

columns.name: Restriction_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Related_Entity_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / Personnel / Equipment

columns.name: Related_Entity_ID
columns.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this restriction attaches to

columns.name: Restriction_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'RestrictionType'. Recommended values: CUI / CMMC_Level_1 / CMMC_Level_2 / CMMC_Level_3 / EAR / ITAR / Publication_Hold / Foreign_Personnel_Limit / Site_Restriction

columns.name: Restriction_Level
columns.description: Free-form qualifier (e.g., a specific ITAR category)

columns.name: Effective_Start_Date
columns.description: When the restriction takes effect

columns.name: Effective_End_Date
columns.description: Null for restrictions in effect indefinitely

columns.name: Authority_Document_Reference
columns.description: The regulation or contract clause this restriction comes from
columns.synonyms: Restriction Authority, Source Regulation, Clause Reference

columns.name: Certified_By_Personnel_ID
columns.description: References Personnel (the OSP or compliance officer who certified the restriction)

columns.name: Restriction_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

Deadline.name: Deadline
Deadline.description: Future-dated obligations attached to an entity. Calendar-style: tells you WHEN.

columns.name: Deadline_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Related_Entity_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / ProposalApproval / ComplianceRequirement / Modification / RFA / Closeout / Report

columns.name: Related_Entity_ID
columns.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this deadline attaches to

columns.name: Deadline_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'DeadlineType'

columns.name: Due_Date
columns.description: When the obligation is due

columns.name: Reminder_Lead_Days
columns.description: Number of days before Due_Date that a reminder fires

columns.name: Responsible_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person responsible for meeting the deadline

columns.name: Deadline_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Free-text description of the obligation

Classification.name: Classification
Classification.description: Subject tags and research-area codes attached to entities.

columns.name: Classification_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Related_Entity_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Proposal / Award / Subaward / ComplianceRequirement

columns.name: Related_Entity_ID
columns.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this classification attaches to

columns.name: Scheme
columns.description: Constrained: NSF_Science_Code / NIH_MeSH / Institution_Research_Area / Free_Tag

columns.name: Value_Code
columns.description: Code or term within the scheme (e.g., NSF science code 40101)

columns.name: Value_Label
columns.description: Human-readable label

columns.name: Sort_Order
columns.description: When the entity carries multiple classifications, the order to display them

Action.name: Action
Action.description: Work items attached to entities: deliverables, checklist items, service requests, modification approvals, compliance renewals, training requirements. Worklist-style: tells you WHAT and WHO.

columns.name: Action_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Related_Entity_Type
columns.description: Constrained: Award / Subaward / Proposal / ProposalApproval / PreAwardAuthorization / Personnel / ComplianceRequirement / Modification / Negotiation / Terms / Closeout / Report / Equipment

columns.name: Related_Entity_ID
columns.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this action attaches to

columns.name: Action_Type_Value_ID
columns.description: Value_Group = 'ActionType'. Recommended values: Deliverable / Checklist_Item / Service_Request / Modification_Approval / Compliance_Renewal / Training_Required / Training_Completion / Subrecipient_Risk_Review / Cost_Transfer_Approval / JIT_Request / Other
columns.synonyms: Work Item Type, Task Category, Workflow Type

columns.name: Title
columns.description: Short title of the work item

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Free-text description of the work item

columns.name: Assignee_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person the action is assigned to

columns.name: Requestor_Personnel_ID
columns.description: The person who requested the action

columns.name: Due_Date
columns.description: When the action is due

columns.name: Action_Status
columns.description: See Status taxonomy

columns.name: Priority
columns.description: Constrained: Low / Medium / High / Critical

columns.name: Completed_Date
columns.description: Required when Action_Status = 'Completed'

columns.name: Origin
columns.description: Constrained: Sponsor_Required / Internal / System_Generated / Manual

columns.name: Outcome_Description
columns.description: Free-text outcome when the Action records a structured workflow with a result (subrecipient risk review, modification approval rationale, training completion notes)

columns.name: Linked_Document_ID
columns.description: References Document (e.g., the deliverable file, training certificate when Completed, the formal subrecipient risk review report)

ActivityLog.name: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Typed audit events on entities. Curated business events the institution chooses to surface, not a CDC log of every column update.

columns.name: ActivityLog_ID
columns.description: PK

columns.name: Related_Entity_Type
columns.description: Constrained to any UDM table name except ActivityLog itself. Not enumerated inline to avoid drift when the canonical table set evolves.

columns.name: Related_Entity_ID
columns.description: The row in the table named by Related_Entity_Type this event is about

columns.name: Activity_Type
columns.description: Agency / sponsor correspondence lives in Communication, not here.

columns.name: Activity_Timestamp
columns.description: When the event occurred

columns.name: Actor_Personnel_ID
columns.description: Null for system-initiated events

columns.name: Old_Value
columns.description: For Activity_Type = 'field_change'

columns.name: New_Value
columns.description: For Activity_Type = 'field_change'

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Free-text description; for field changes, includes the field name
